_comment: Work-laptop ~/.claude/settings.json template. deploy.sh copies this to ~/.claude/settings.json on the work laptop and merges it with the bridge / memory-work MCP entries that work_setup.sh wires in.

hooks._comment_hooks: PreToolUse and PostToolUse entries are written by claude-bridge/tools/work_setup.sh Section E. Don't hand-edit; rerun work_setup.sh to refresh. The Stop hook (response_quality_check) ships via the reply-style.md rule materialiser.
